headline: United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) Eyes Medicines and Pharmaceutical Opportunities with $48M Investment
summary: United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is one of the best dividend stocks yielding at least 5% to buy according to hedge funds. On June 22, CNBC reported that United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is poised to invest $48 million in 27 temperature-controlled facilities. The investment comes as the logistics powerhouse seeks to capitalize on a […]
